title: potentilla supina subsp. paradoxa
intro: Potentilla supina subsp. paradoxa, also known as Silver Buffaloberry or Wolf Willow, is a shrub native to North America, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small white flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Potentilla supina subsp. paradoxa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
